task_completion.description: Open the Business/Store settings in Copper POS
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Options or Settings dialog in NCH Copper Point of Sale is open, specifically showing the 'Business' or 'Store Details' tab.
The text 'Hawthorne & Vine General Store' is entered into the Business Name or Store Name field.
The address fields contain '2847 SE Hawthorne Blvd' for the street, 'Portland' for the city, 'OR' for the state/province, '97214' for the zip/postal code, and 'United States' for the country.

task_completion.description: Enter the phone, email, and website
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contact fields contain '(503) 555-0178' for the phone number, 'hello@hawthornevine.com' for the email address, and 'www.hawthornevine.com' for the website.
The text '93-4821057' is entered into the Tax ID, Registration Number, or Business Number field.

task_completion.description: Save or apply the business profile configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'OK', 'Save', or 'Apply' on the settings dialog, OR the main Copper POS window is visible and reflects the new store name 'Hawthorne & Vine General Store' in the interface.

integrity.description: The agent used the Copper POS graphical interface to configure the settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Copper POS application windows and dialogs, rather than a terminal window using PowerShell or registry commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine NCH Copper Point of Sale software
integrity.visual_evidence: The application being configured is clearly NCH Copper POS, not a mock application, web browser, or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply paste the required information into a text file
integrity.visual_evidence: The store details are entered into the specific form fields of the Copper POS settings dialog, not written into Notepad or another text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Portland, Oregon (OR) is a real city in the United States, and 97214 is a valid ZIP code for the Hawthorne District. The standard Windows Registry path for NCH Software Copper Point of Sale configuration is HKCU:\Software\NCH Software\Copper.
